name: Commercial APIs
short_description: Integration and evaluation of third-party STT APIs, primarily Deepgram Nova-2, as the production baseline.
detailed_description: Covers tasks that call, configure, and measure commercial speech-to-text services. The main subject is Deepgram Nova-2, which is the current Rezolve production STT endpoint. Work in this category establishes the baseline accuracy and latency numbers that all open-source and fine-tuned approaches are compared against. It may also include evaluation of other commercial options (e.g., Azure Speech, Google STT) if they become relevant to the research roadmap.
